label: Civilians Killed (AAPP)
contestNote: AAPP documents confirmed civilian deaths; actual toll significantly higher — ACLED estimates 50,000+ total conflict deaths including combatants

label: Internally Displaced Persons
deltaNote: Massive surge driven by conflict and earthquake

label: Political Prisoners
contestNote: 29,507 total arrested since coup; 2,000+ died in detention
deltaNote: Includes deaths in custody from torture and denied healthcare

label: SAC Territory Control
contestNote: SAC claims broader control; NUG estimates junta controls fewer than 100 of 350+ townships as of Aug 2024

label: Air Attacks Documented (2025)
contestNote: ACLED 2025 figure for air attacks; junta minimizes civilian impact claims

label: Townships Under Resistance Control
source: NUG Ministry of Defense / Crisis Group (2024)
contestNote: Contested and dynamic; junta disputes these figures

label: 2025 Humanitarian Plan Funded
contestNote: Severe underfunding leaves millions without aid
